name: Caramel Apple Pie
recipeInstructions:
----------------------------------FILLING----------------------------------
6 cups Apples; peeled and sliced
3/4 cup Sugar
2 tablespoons Flour
1 teaspoon Cinnamon
2 tablespoons Lemon juice
Ice cream, if desired
-----------------------------------GLAZE-----------------------------------
1/3 cup Caramel topping
1/4 cup Pecans; chopped
Prepare pie crust according to package directions for a two-crust pie using 9-inch pie pan.
Sprinkle 1/4 cup pecans on bottom of pie crust-lined pan. Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C).
In a large bowl, combine all filling ingredients; mix lightly. Pour into pie crust-lined pan. Top with second crust and flute according to directions that follow; cut slits in several places.
Bake at 425°F (220°C) for 35 to 45 minutes or until apples are tender and crust is golden brown. Cover the edge of the pie crust with strips of foil after 15 to 20 minutes of baking to prevent excessive browning.
Serve warm with ice cream, if desired. Drizzle with caramel topping; sprinkle with pecans. Serve warm. 8 Servings
Robe or Spiral Edge: Trim bottom crust even with the edge of the pie pan. Fold overhang of top crust under bottom crust so it is even with the edge of the pan.
To create the rope of spiral edge, press your thumb at an angle into the edge of the crust and pinch the dough between your thumb and index finger of your other hand. Repeat this pattern diagonally around the edge of the pie pan.
